doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: This document fundamentally misrepresents Illinois eviction law by falsely claiming tenants must vacate within 5 days without judicial process, contradicting actual legal requirements for court-ordered evictions.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 98
REASON: This document fundamentally misrepresents Illinois tenant law by falsely claiming tenants must vacate within 5 days without court process, contradicting basic due process rights and the actual Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act which requires judicial eviction proceedings.
response_turn2:
